description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has multiple jobs: doc, lin-build, lin-test, win-makepkg, win-test, and Release. The doc job builds documentation, lin-build and lin-test jobs build and test on Ubuntu, win-makepkg and win-test jobs build and test on Windows, and the Release job creates a release if certain conditions are met.
